## Checklist

- [ ] Tested on a fresh install (not just dev environment)
- [ ] Works in all three deployment modes (Standard, Traefik, Traefik + Authelia)
- [ ] No hardcoded ports, paths, or credentials
- [ ] App count references use "100+" (not a specific number)
- [ ] Wiki updated if this changes user-facing behavior
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By` or AI attribution in commits
